task.objective: Correct the clean-room Project Canopy diagnostic rasterizer so Frontier Shards can bake grounded multi-angle foliage impostors with per-pixel UV alpha, depth, and de-lit colour instead of opaque card rectangles.

outputs: tools/showcase/render_showcase.py: perspective-correct per-pixel UV interpolation, texture alpha cutout, depth-buffered triangle rasterization, foliage alpha erosion, and de-lit asset-bake mode

validation.command: Frontier pnpm assets:canopy import and eight-angle impostor bake
validation.result: 18 Canopy styles rendered through the updated rasterizer with transparent silhouettes

sources_consulted: Project Canopy source geometry and procedurally generated sample textures

risks: The rasterizer is an offline diagnostic and bake helper, not a realtime renderer
Impostor colour is deliberately de-lit; Frontier applies authoritative runtime lighting
